name: hermes-hook-observer-kit
description: Codex plugin for the Hermes hook-driven observational control plane. Instruments sessions with typed semantic hooks, prepares subscriber manifests, and runs an observer agent that builds long-horizon traces and emits quality/risk/alignment signals.

interface.shortDescription: Instrument Hermes sessions with typed hooks and run the observational control plane.
interface.longDescription: A Codex-native plugin that prepares a Hermes session surface with typed semantic hooks, assigns event topics, produces a subscriber manifest, and runs the hermes-event-observer agent to build long-horizon traces, evaluate behaviour against design intent and NCP narrative constraints, and emit quality/risk/alignment signals back into the control plane.
defaultPrompt: Prepare hook instrumentation for this Hermes session.
Run the observer agent on the current event trace.
Emit quality and risk signals for this session.
